libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For version 5.0.0, use Jackson 3 types from `tools.jackson.*`, especially `tools.jackson.databind.JsonNode`, when inspecting generated schemas. Do not add or import Jackson 2 `com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode`; `SchemaGenerator.generateSchema(...)` now returns Jackson 3 nodes. No Docker image, environment variable, or system property appears required.

deterministic_setup.reason: jsonschema-module-swagger-2 declares jsonschema-generator as provided, but normal use instantiates SchemaGenerator and SchemaGeneratorConfigBuilder alongside Swagger2Module.
The module reads Swagger/OpenAPI v3 annotations that are declared provided by the artifact; test models need these annotations on the test compile classpath.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8739 [Automation] javac compile fails for com.github.victools:jsonschema-module-swagger-2:5.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Copying the 4.38.0 test source unchanged will fail to compile because it imports Jackson 2 `com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode`.
Using the old hard-coded Swagger annotations version may compile but is not aligned with the 5.0.0 parent dependency management, which uses 2.2.41.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: This module is a provided-scope extension of jsonschema-generator and Swagger annotations; meaningful tests need those compile-time dependencies, and version 5.0.0 uses Jackson 3 packages.
